message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.lib.recfunctions.{drop,rename,append}_fields + merge_arrays + unstructured_to_structured wrappers (br-franken_numpy-j2vb, br-franken_numpy-kl5f, br-franken_numpy-9iw4, br-franken_numpy-2vc8, br-franken_numpy-n7pr)

Expose five numpy.lib.recfunctions helpers as recfunctions_<name>
passthrough pyfunctions.

Joint parity oracle test covers:
- drop_fields: single-name drop + multi-name list drop with dtype.names parity
- rename_fields: dict remap of field names with names-list parity
- append_fields: new 'd' field appended to 3-row structured array
- merge_arrays: side-by-side merge of two structured arrays
- unstructured_to_structured: 3x3 float array -> 1-D struct with 3 fields

Test constructs structured arrays via numpy.eval bridge to avoid
pyo3 dtype-string tuple construction issues.
